comment: Recorded input->output trace. Each step feeds 'inputs' as the process image and expects 'outputs' after one scan; the previous scan's outputs carry into the next step (retentive latch).

steps.note: start dry (below low): latch reset, fan off
rising through the hysteresis band: nothing latched yet
crossed the high threshold: latch set, fan on
falling back into the band: latch holds (hysteresis), fan stays on
dropped below the low threshold: latch reset, fan off
both true at once: reset dominates (R rung is last), fan off
